strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with ~20 years of diverse software engineering across systems, web, mobile, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrates technical depth with strong low-level systems expertise (high-performance async I/O, microservices handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Evidence of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through multiple workshops, open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and teaching courses
concerns: No demonstrated ML/AI product expertise or portfolio—role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
Resume is heavily weighted toward individual-contributor technical work with limited evidence of director-level strategic decision-making or advising customers on technology adoption
Recent MCP work (agent infrastructure) is tooling-focused, not AI/ML product strategy; no TensorFlow, PyTorch, or ML frameworks in skill set

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI/ML product expertise and strategy background
Limited evidence of strategic/director-level influence and customer advisory work
Strong technical foundation and systems architecture experience across domains

response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled and experienced engineer with impressive technical breadth across multiple domains and 20 years of professional experience. However, this Principal Engineer role has a specific focus on AI strategy and requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume shows infrastructure and tooling contributions (MCP, agents) but lacks the ML/AI product expertise, strategic positioning, and director-level decision-making experience this role demands. He would be an excellent fit for a general principal platform engineer role, but not for this AI-strategy-focused position.
